{{Quote|It is when the Republic faces its greatest tests that the true spirit of our people shines through—whether in responding to the horrific crime of Serroco, or in defending our homes on Taris.|Catronus Steffans|<ref name="siege" />}}
'''Catronus Steffans''' was the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Defense Ministry Director for Public Information]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. As such, [[Gender/Legends|he]] gave public comments on various subjects regarding the war with the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]], along with receiving daily briefs on various subjects concerning the war. Steffans was often quoted in news sources such as the ''[[Taris Holofeed]]'' and ''[[The Admiral's List]]''. During the first couple [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the war, Steffans issued statements and gave news conferences on several important events. Steffans was quoted in the ''Taris Holofeed'' after the early stalemate on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Suurja]], and after the war progressed beyond the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]] and to the highly-populated planet [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], Steffans gave a press conference during a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Taris Siege|siege]]. After the Mandalorians [[Battle of Serroco|devastated]] the Republic planet [[Serroco]] with [[Nuclear weapon/Legends|nuclear bombs]], he furiously decried the "horrific crime" and called [[Mandalore the Ultimate]] himself an "abomination."

==Biography==
{{Quote|We must remember what we're fighting for, after all.|Catronus Steffans|<ref name="veltraa">{{KOTORbackups|13}}</ref>}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]],<ref name="siege" /> Catronus Steffans was the [[Defense Ministry Director for Public Information]]<ref name="brief" /> for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the period of the [[Mandalorian Wars]].<ref name="prime" /> Starting in [[3976 BBY]], [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] from the fringes of known [[Realspace/Legends|space]] began conquering [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the far reaches in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="kotor">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> before clashing with the Republic in [[3964 BBY]]. By that [[Time/Legends|time]] Steffans was a high-ranking defense official with the Republic and had made himself available for comment on [[Republic Military/Legends|military]] affairs for news sources. That year, a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] advance in the Outer Rim was halted at the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]] set up by [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saul Karath]]. After [[First battle of Suurja|four]] [[Second battle of Suurja|consecutive]] [[Third battle of Suurja|inconclusive]] [[Fourth battle of Suurja|battles]] at the planet [[Suurja]], Steffans commented to the ''[[Taris Holofeed]]'' that these events showed the success of the cordon, and that a Republic pushback was upcoming. In addition, Steffans spoke on the recent controversy within the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] over participation in the war, stating that the Republic valued its relationship with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and would support the Order in any endeavors.<ref name="prime" />

The [[3963 BBY|next year]], Steffans was quoted in an [[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition|edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'' regarding a dispute over the status of [[Fringer/Legends|fringers]] and freelance [[Merchant/Legends|tradesbeings]] in [[Navy/Legends|naval]] groups—Republic [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Noma Sommos]] had filed a complaint about them after recent incidents in the Outer Rim. Steffans did not take a side in the debate, stating that the greater question was whether the Republic would abandon the commercial opportunities it were known for in the name of military expenditure.<ref name="veltraa" /> Later that year, the Mandalorian Wars began to truly heat up—the planet [[Serroco]] was [[Battle of Serroco|devastated]] by Mandalorian [[Nuclear weapon/Legends|nuclear bombs]],<ref name="kotor15">[[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]]</ref> and [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] itself was placed under a [[Taris Siege|heavy siege]]. Following the bombing of Serroco, Steffans gave a remote press conference about the planet's devastation. Steffans was also able to spare a few words on the attack on Taris, saying that the crises on Taris and Serroco were the types of great tests that allowed the true spirit of the Republic to shine. This press conference was reported on for an [[The Taris Holofeed: Siege Edition|edition]] of the ''Taris Holofeed''.<ref name="siege" /> In a later [[The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition|edition]] of the ''The Admiral's List'', Steffans indicated his shock, horror, and anger over the attack on Serroco and, with heavily populated worlds such as [[Telerath/Legends|Telerath]], [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]], and [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] potentially under threat by the Mandalorians, indicated that future Republic military policy was under review.<ref name="serroco">{{KOTORbackups|16}}</ref>

Later that year, [[Arkoh Adasca]], head of Republic-allied corporation [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania]], or Adascorp, was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during a reported [[First Battle of Omonoth|attack]] on his [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], the ''[[Arkanian Legacy]]'', by Mandalorians. Although little was known of the incident at the time, Steffans issued a statement about Adasca's death. Assuring that medical goods and processed materials from Adascorp were continuing to make their way to the Republic, Steffans remembered Adasca as a great and loyal citizen of the Republic, and declared his expectation that a productive relationship between the Republic and Adascorp would continue well into the future.<ref name="karath">{{KOTORbackups|22}}</ref>

At a later point in the war, Steffans, in his position as Defense Ministry Director of Public Information, received a [[Galactic Republic Defense Ministry Daily Brief KD0092|daily brief]] on military happenings from the Defense Ministry [[Joint Operations Information Office]]. The brief, which contained information on Mandalorian operations on Taris and [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]], along with updates on happenings in the Jedi Order and the production of war materiel, also provided policy recommendations from the Information Office.<ref name="brief" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|No one acquainted with the rules of war could have expected the shocking and abhorrent acts of the abomination called Mandalore.|Catronus Steffans, after the devastation of Serroco|<ref name="serroco" />}}
In his public statements, Director for Public Information<ref name="brief" /> Catronus Steffans spoke directly for the Republic Defense Ministry. As such, in his on-the-record comments on the Mandalorian Wars, he provided a very pro-Republic stance. Steffans was able to communicate a hopeful message even during trying times, including during his press conference in the midst of the siege of Taris.<ref name="siege" /> Steffans also produced his fair share of furious anti-Mandalorian rhetoric, especially after the devastation of Serroco, which he called "shocking and abhorrent" and [[Mandalore the Ultimate]] himself an "abomination."<ref name="serroco" /> Early on in the Mandalorian Wars, Steffans was very optimistic about the Republic's military progress—for example, after the stalemate on Suurja Steffans predicted that the recent success of the Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line would soon result in a Republic pushback.<ref name="prime" /> Beyond just military matters, Steffans believed that the commercial opportunities afforded by the Republic were important and one of the concepts for which it was fighting..<ref name="veltraa" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Catronus Steffans was quoted but never directly appeared in several issues of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series. Steffans was first quoted in ''[[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition]]'', an [[in-universe]] news report included on the last page of [[Knights of the Old Republic 0|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 0]]. Steffans went on to be mentioned in several more such in-universe reports in subsequent issues of the series.
